name: Customer-Service-and-Contact-V1.docx
content:
What are C.E. King's customer service response times and how do I escalate?

C.E. King aims to respond to all enquiries within one business day. If you have not received a response within two business days, please follow up via the website chat or email support@ceking.com.

Details

  • Primary support email: support@ceking.com
  • Sales enquiries: sales@ceking.com
  • Account queries: accounts@ceking.com
  • Website chat available during UK business hours
  • If your enquiry is urgent, please state this clearly in the subject line
  • For order-related issues, always include your order number or invoice number
  • The support team operates Monday to Friday, UK business hours
  • International customers: please allow for time zone differences in response times
  • If you have been waiting for a response, the chatbot can help route your enquiry to the right team member

Link: https://www.ceking.com/pages/contact
